summary_one_line: A well-formed protocol stream (POP3/HTTP magic + headers) that yields a non-empty network read, so is_empty_data is FALSE.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Input must reconstruct a syntactically valid protocol payload (leading POP3 magic 'pop'/'pop3', the literal 'HTTP/' response line and header tokens like 'Set-Cookie'/'Transfer'/'Connection', port digits '9001') so that Curl_read returns nread>0 and is_empty_data = ((nread==0)&&(k->bodywrites==0)) evaluates FALSE, taking the false (blocked) side at line 849.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry contiguous magic/protocol byte runs the loser lacks: 'pop' at 0x06, 'HTTP/' near 0x24-0x29, and recognizable header text ('Connect'/'Set-Coo'/'TranEfe') at 0x36-0x3e, producing data that is written as a body (bodywrites>0) so nread>0 and is_empty_data is FALSE; the branch is hit 1716/1757 times.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds are short (35 bytes) and dominated by filler runs ('%','+','A','.') with no coherent 'HTTP/' line or header tokens, so the read path yields nread==0 with bodywrites==0, forcing is_empty_data TRUE (the true side) and never exercising the false side (avg hitcount 0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the program's expected protocol literals (magic, 'HTTP/', header tokens, port) directly at the matching input offsets, reconstructing the well-formed stream byte-for-byte; naive and value_profile lack this substitution mutator and cannot stitch these multi-byte literals together by chance, so they stall on the empty-read true side.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the false branch of if(is_empty_data) at transfer.c:849.
is_empty_data is TRUE only when nread==0 and bodywrites==0, so the false side requires a non-empty read.
Both decisive pairs differ only by the I2S technique and the winner resolves 10/10 with high hitcount while the loser stays blocked at 0.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=1716  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The value_profile_cmplog>value_profile pair is likewise an I2S delta resolving 10/10.
Winner seeds contain coherent POP3 magic and an HTTP response line with header tokens.
Winner seed 1 carries a 'Set-Cookie' header token in its payload.
Loser seeds are 35 bytes and lack coherent protocol structure, dominated by filler bytes.
At offset 0x24 winners concentrate on 'G' while losers scatter, the start of the HTTP/ literal region.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes one CMP operand into the input at matching offsets, which naive lacks.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S stage so cannot perform the operand substitution.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 441 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 00f515acb6373e33` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 19 and 20 of the 21-level ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose false-branch read depends on no multi-byte literal (e.g. is_empty_data gated only on a length field reachable by single-byte havoc) showing naive/value_profile resolve the false side as fast as cmplog/vpc.

weakest_evidence_point: I cannot directly observe nread/bodywrites at runtime; the claim that winners produce nread>0 is inferred from the source guard at L594 plus the structured payload bytes, not measured.
